Photos folder

This folder is empty on purpose — placeholder or stock photos would look generic and would undercut the "we've actually done this work" credibility that matters most for NexBridge. Real photography from your own projects will always beat stock imagery here.

When you have real photos, this is where they go. Suggested files and sizes:

  • founder.jpg — your headshot for the About > Founder page. Square, at least 800x800px.
  • factory-01.jpg, factory-02.jpg, etc. — shop floor / production line shots for Industries and Knowledge articles. Landscape, at least 1600px wide.
  • case-study-[name]-01.jpg — photos tied to specific case studies, named by project so they're easy to find later.
  • team.jpg — group or office photo for About.

Keep filenames lowercase with hyphens (no spaces) so they work reliably as URLs once the site is live.
